name: Ethanol 70% (v/v) aqueous solution
_disclaimer: FIELD QUICK-REFERENCE ONLY. This is NOT the authoritative Safety Data Sheet. Always consult the manufacturer's current SDS for the exact product. In an emergency call your local poison control / emergency number.
hazards: May cause drowsiness or dizziness from vapor (H336)

first_aid.eyes: Rinse cautiously with water 15+ min, remove contacts if easy, seek medical attention.
first_aid.skin: Wash with soap and water. Remove contaminated clothing.
first_aid.inhalation: Move to fresh air; rest. If breathing is difficult, get medical help.
first_aid.ingestion: Do NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth, call poison control.

fire: Use alcohol-resistant foam, CO2, dry chemical, or water spray. Vapor is heavier than air and can travel to an ignition source.
spill: Eliminate ignition sources, ventilate, absorb with inert material, collect for disposal. Keep out of drains/waterways.
storage: Cool, ventilated, away from heat/sparks/open flame. Keep container closed and grounded when transferring.
field_notes: Common as a specimen preservative. Flammability is the main field hazard — keep away from camp stoves, vehicle exhaust, and electronics that spark.
